steps.action: Launch app with --auth-status approved --use-in-memory-store --seed-analytics-data
Tap Stats tab
Wait for Total Focus Time static text
steps.observed: Card title 'Total Focus Time' visible within 10s

steps.action: Check Sessions card title
Scroll up and check streak card
Verify card values (3h 0m, 3, 3 days)
Launch without data, navigate to Stats
steps.observed: 'No sessions yet' text visible; 'Total Focus Time' card NOT present

evidence.consoleErrors: Spurious UIAccessibilityLoaderWebShared class-duplication warning (benign runtime warning, not a test error); IDELaunchParametersSnapshot debugger version notices (benign)
evidence.xctestResults: testDashboardShowsSummaryCards: passed (9.543s), testDashboardCardValues: passed (9.683s), testEmptyStateWhenNoSessions: passed (8.414s)

steps.action: Launch app with seeded data, navigate to Stats tab
steps.observed: Stats view loaded; 'Total Focus Time' text confirmed

steps.action: Scroll down to find Screen Time section header
steps.observed: 'Screen Time' static text found within 5s after two scroll-up swipes

evidence.consoleErrors: none (same benign runtime warnings as above)

assertions.title: Session history list with detail view

steps.action: Launch app with seeded data, navigate to Stats tab
Scroll to find and tap Session History button
Verify Completed badge present in history list
Tap first cell in collection view
Verify detail content labels
steps.expected: Status, Mode Type, Duration, Bypasses, Breaks labels visible
steps.observed: All labels found; 'Deep Focus' mode type text confirmed

evidence.xctestResults: testSessionHistoryNavigation: passed (10.851s), testSessionHistoryShowsSessions: passed (11.787s), testSessionDetailNavigation: passed (15.052s), testSessionDetailShowsCorrectMetadata: passed (14.919s)

assertions.issues: Sort order (reverse chronological) was not explicitly asserted by a dedicated sort-order test — the tests navigate to history and verify content but do not check cell ordering by date. The seeded data scenario covers the flow but not strict sort verification.

assertions.title: Charts render with varying data volumes

steps.action: Launch with seeded data, navigate to Stats
Scroll up to reveal charts area; check AnalyticsChartsContainer
Check charts not shown in empty state
steps.observed: PASSED — container absent in empty state

steps.action: Scroll up, check 'Daily Usage' title text
Scroll up twice, check 'Weekly Trend' title text
Check DailyUsageBarChart accessibility identifier
steps.observed: FAILED — element not found after 5s timeout

steps.action: Check WeeklyTrendLineChart accessibility identifier
steps.observed: FAILED — element not found after 5s timeout

evidence.xctestResults: testChartsContainerPresent: passed (8.993s), testChartsNotShownWhenNoData: passed (7.299s), testDailyUsageBarChartPresent: passed (9.573s), testWeeklyTrendLineChartPresent: passed (10.675s), testDailyUsageBarChartAccessibility: FAILED (14.032s) — 'DailyUsageBarChart' accessibility identifier missing on chart element, testWeeklyTrendLineChartAccessibility: FAILED (14.610s) — 'WeeklyTrendLineChart' accessibility identifier missing on chart element

assertions.issues: The chart views ('Daily Usage' bar chart and 'Weekly Trend' line chart) render and their section titles are visible, but the chart SwiftUI views themselves do not have the expected accessibility identifiers (.accessibilityIdentifier("DailyUsageBarChart") and .accessibilityIdentifier("WeeklyTrendLineChart")) attached. The AnalyticsChartsContainer accessibility identifier IS present and working. The missing identifiers on the individual chart views caused testDailyUsageBarChartAccessibility and testWeeklyTrendLineChartAccessibility to fail.

frictions.description: AnalyticsChartsUITests combined with AnalyticsDashboardUITests in a single xcodebuild invocation using two -only-testing flags works correctly — no issue with multiple flags as warned in the task.
frictions.resolution: Ran tests in two separate invocations as instructed to avoid any potential flag issue

summary: Tested 4 assertions across 14 XCUITests (8 in AnalyticsDashboardUITests + 6 in AnalyticsChartsUITests). VAL-STATS-001 (pass): all 3 dashboard card tests passed including empty state. VAL-STATS-002 (pass): Screen Time section header confirmed present. VAL-STATS-003 (pass): session history navigation and detail view tests all passed. VAL-STATS-016 (fail): charts container and chart titles render correctly (4/6 tests passed), but accessibility identifiers 'DailyUsageBarChart' and 'WeeklyTrendLineChart' are not set on the individual chart views — 2 tests failed.
